title: Perf: reduce repeated sort work in PlanInput tabs and lists
close_reason: Completed

title: Fix macOS launch crash when running scripts/launch-mac.sh --clean
description: Repro: launch app with scripts/launch-mac.sh --clean; app crashes on startup with assertion in DemoApp.init() (demoApp.swift:20). Investigate cleanup path interaction with bootstrap assumptions, implement minimal safe fix, and verify via swiftlint + Core tests + macOS build + launch script clean run.
close_reason: Root cause fixed: SwiftData migration failed for mandatory PlanDocument.automationPermissionPolicyRaw on legacy default.store; added declaration-level defaults for policy raw fields and verified launch no longer crashes.

title: Perf: debounce PlanDocument.updatedAt writes to avoid list resort churn
close_reason: Completed

title: Perf: capture Instruments metrics for route/document switching after optimization
description: Collect SwiftUI + Time Profiler traces for route switching and document switching on macOS; compare before/after CPU and frame hitch indicators; document results in docs/perf notes.

title: Execution Hub Roadmap: Long Term
description: Deliver ecosystem integrations and advanced governance.
acceptance_criteria: All long-term features/tasks are defined with clear dependency chain.
close_reason: Closed long-term execution hub roadmap items: external sync baseline, evidence-task traceability, and automation guardrails/auditability all implemented.

title: Integrate optional external task sync
description: Optional bridge to reminders/calendar ecosystems.
close_reason: External sync integration baseline completed: adapter abstraction, task mapping, sync metadata persistence, and conflict ownership policy controls.

title: Implement external sync adapters and mapping
description: Sync adapter abstraction and field mapping.
close_reason: Implemented external sync adapter abstraction and mapping in Core/Execution/ExternalTaskSync.swift; extended TodoItem with external sync metadata fields; added mapping tests in Core/Tests/CoreTests/ExternalTaskSyncTests.swift.

title: Implement sync conflict and ownership policy
description: Conflict strategy and user-visible ownership rules.
close_reason: Implemented sync ownership policy resolver (local/remote/manual review) in Core/Execution/ExternalTaskSync.swift, added policy tests, and exposed user-visible ownership controls in execution toolbar with policy-driven mock sync action.

title: Link evidence/citations to execution tasks
description: Tie claims/citations to actionable work with traceability.
close_reason: Completed evidence-task association model and execution evidence visibility (demo-a8m.2.1 + demo-a8m.2.2).

title: Implement evidence-task association model
description: Persistent links between task items and citations/claims.
close_reason: Added persistent evidence association fields on TodoItem (linkedClaimIDsRaw/linkedCitationIDsRaw + normalized accessors) and passing TodoEvidenceAssociationTests.

title: Implement evidence visibility in execution views
description: Display and navigation UX for evidence-backed tasks.
close_reason: Added evidence visibility and navigation UX in execution view, plus evidence association editing controls in todo editor. Verified by swift test, macOS/iOS xcodebuild, and swiftlint.

title: Add automation guardrails and auditability
description: Control blast radius of automation and record rationale.
close_reason: Completed automation guardrails and auditability work via demo-a8m.3.1 and demo-a8m.3.2, including policy controls, audit logging, and manual review UX.

title: Implement automation permission policy controls
description: Configurable policy to constrain auto actions.
close_reason: Implemented configurable automation permission policies (manualOnly/assistive/fullAuto) with persisted document setting and execution-toolbar controls; policies now gate recommendation and sync automation behavior.

title: Implement automation audit trail and review flow
description: Track auto-generated changes and reviewer actions.
close_reason: Implemented persistent automation audit entries and execution review flow: pending sync review queue, approve/apply-remote and keep-local reviewer actions, plus audit panel in execution view.

title: Execution Hub Roadmap: Short Term (1-2 weeks)
description: Deliver quick wins for execution workflow and usability.
acceptance_criteria: All short-term features/tasks created with dependencies; at least one feature ready.
close_reason: Completed short-term roadmap features ad3.1-ad3.4 with implementation and verification.

title: Standardize Todo semantics (status/priority/completion)
description: Define canonical execution semantics for task state transitions and priority.
acceptance_criteria: Semantic field contract documented and linked to implementation tasks.
close_reason: Completed semantic Todo standardization: Core model semantic fields/defaults + UI editor/list bindings + generation/create defaults + documentation updates in README and PROJECT_OVERVIEW; verified with swift test, xcodebuild (macOS+iOS), and swiftlint.

title: Implement Todo semantic fields and migration-safe defaults
description: Add/bridge semantic fields and preserve compatibility.
close_reason: Implemented Todo semantic fields/defaults in Core model; added semantic tests and compatibility fallback; verified via swift test, xcodebuild (macOS+iOS), swiftlint.

title: Bind semantic fields in editor/list interactions
description: Replace free text status with constrained controls where appropriate.
close_reason: Replaced free-text todo status with constrained status/priority pickers, added completion binding/time control, and updated todo list row to render semantic status/priority/completed state; verified by builds/tests/lint.

title: Add Execution dashboard route and filters
description: Provide daily execution cockpit: Today/Overdue/Done/Blocked filters.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard feature has implementation + validation tasks.
close_reason: Execution dashboard route and filters completed via tasks demo-ad3.2.1 and demo-ad3.2.2; verified by swift test, macOS/iOS xcodebuild, and swiftlint clean.

title: Implement execution route and base view scaffold
description: Add workspace route and shell view.
close_reason: Added new execution workspace route/shell across sidebar route model, macOS detail routing, and iOS tabs (executionTab entrypoint wired).

title: Implement execution filters and quick actions
description: Today/Overdue/Done/Blocked filtering and state quick updates.
close_reason: Implemented execution dashboard filters (Today/Overdue/Done/Blocked) and quick status actions (todo/doing/blocked/done reopen) with semantic Todo state updates.

title: Add Step2 merge mode (replace/merge)
description: Prevent blind overwrite by introducing merge strategy for generated todos/cards.
acceptance_criteria: Merge strategy + tests are explicitly tracked.
close_reason: Completed Step2 merge mode feature with core logic, UI mode selector, and regression coverage.

title: Implement Step2 merge strategy core logic
description: Support replace and merge paths with deterministic behavior.
close_reason: Implemented Step2 replace/merge strategy with deterministic deduping and integrated mode selection into Step2 generation flow.

title: Add merge strategy regression tests
description: Cover replace/merge and compatibility scenarios.
close_reason: Added Step2 merge regression tests covering replace behavior, merge append order, and normalization-based deduplication.

title: Add extended todo export (non-breaking)
description: Keep legacy export intact and add extended export with execution fields.
acceptance_criteria: Backward compatibility and new export coverage tracked.
close_reason: Completed non-breaking extended todo export with compatibility coverage.

title: Implement extended todo export format
description: Add export function with execution-related fields.
close_reason: Implemented extended todo export function and UI entry; added coverage for extended execution fields.

title: Add export compatibility and escaping tests
description: Ensure legacy export unchanged and new export reliable.
close_reason: Added compatibility and escaping tests for legacy and extended todo CSV exports.

title: Execution Hub Roadmap: Mid Term (1-2 months)
description: Deliver structural upgrades for recommendation and robustness.
acceptance_criteria: All mid-term features/tasks created and correctly blocked by prerequisites.
close_reason: All mid-term execution hub features completed: local recommendation engine, Step2 schema v2 compatibility upgrade, and provider connectivity diagnostics.

title: Build local execution suggestion engine
description: Rule-based local recommendations for daily execution.
close_reason: Completed local suggestion engine with scoring rules and user confirmation flow.

title: Implement recommendation rules and scoring
description: Prioritize actionable todos using due/effort/status.
close_reason: Implemented local recommendation scoring rules (due/effort/status/priority), added regression tests, and integrated score-based ordering into execution view.

title: Implement suggestion confirmation UI flow
description: Human-in-the-loop apply/reject flow for recommendations.
close_reason: Implemented human-in-the-loop suggestion flow with explicit adopt/reject actions in execution view and recommendation state handling.

title: Upgrade Step2 schema to v2 with backward compatibility
description: Add optional semantic output fields while preserving v1 decode.
close_reason: Completed Step2 schema v2 upgrade with backward compatibility and compatibility tests; app persistence now consumes optional semantic fields while preserving v1 behavior.

title: Implement Step2 v2 output schema changes
description: Pipeline and model output contract updates.
close_reason: Implemented Step2 v2 schema in Core: optional todo semantic fields (statusRaw/priorityRaw/scheduledAtISO8601/dueAtISO8601), upgraded prompt contract to step2-v2, and wired app-side parsing/fallback mapping into TodoItem persistence.

title: Add Step2 v1/v2 decoder compatibility tests
description: Ensure old/new payloads remain decodable.
close_reason: Added explicit v1/v2 decoder compatibility tests in Core/Tests/CoreTests/Step2OutputDecoderCompatibilityTests.swift (legacy payload decode + v2 optional semantic fields decode + prompt version assertion).

title: Add provider connectivity diagnostics
description: Fast provider health check and actionable failure diagnostics.
close_reason: Feature completed via demo-ayx.3.1 and demo-ayx.3.2; connectivity diagnostics now implemented end-to-end in provider settings.

title: Implement provider ping/latency/error classification
description: Connectivity probe and categorized failure outcomes.
close_reason: Implemented ProviderConnectivityProbe in Core with latency measurement and error classification; added TDD coverage in Core/Tests/CoreTests/ProviderConnectivityProbeTests.swift.

title: Implement diagnostics panel and user guidance text
description: Expose probe results and fix suggestions in settings UI.
close_reason: Added diagnostics panel and guidance text in Provider settings; wired test-connection action, status badge, latency/HTTP display, and actionable remediation messages.

title: Adopt beads for issue tracking
description: Use beads (bd) as the source of truth for issue tracking in this repo. Acceptance: (1) beads initialized in repo, (2) this issue set to in_progress, (3) session ends with bd sync --flush-only.
close_reason: Superseded by structured Epic->Feature->Task roadmap for execution hub

acceptance_criteria: swiftlint reports 0 violations; Core tests pass; macOS and iOS simulator builds succeed
close_reason: Completed self-check remediation: lint 0 violations + tests/build pass

title: Configure git remote/upstream for main
description: Session cleanup blocked: git pull --rebase and git push fail because this repo has no configured remote and main has no upstream tracking branch. Configure remote (e.g., origin) and set upstream, then push commit b44eca8.
close_reason: Local-only development; remote/upstream intentionally out of scope

title: Concurrency and SwiftUI performance audit/remediation for PlanInput
description: Use swift-concurrency-expert and swiftui-performance-audit workflows on PlanInput feature area. Scope: (1) verify actor isolation assumptions and concurrency-safe boundaries, (2) identify high-impact SwiftUI runtime hot spots from code-first review, (3) implement minimal behavior-preserving fixes, (4) run swiftlint + swift test + macOS/iOS builds. Acceptance: no build/test/lint regressions and measurable code-level reduction in repeated per-row/per-render work in execution views.
close_reason: Completed concurrency/performance remediation: added explicit @MainActor UI boundaries and Sendable request/value types; reduced execution view repeated per-row dictionary work via shared ExecutionEvidenceLookup + score map injection; verified by swiftlint, swift test, macOS build, and iOS simulator build.

title: Remove file_length suppression by splitting execution/editor views
description: User approved full cleanup. Split large SwiftUI files to satisfy lint without file_length suppression comments, keep behavior unchanged, and re-run full verification.
acceptance_criteria: No file_length suppression comments in modified files; swiftlint 0 violations; swift test + macOS/iOS builds pass
close_reason: Split PlanInput execution/editor files; removed file_length suppressions; fixed editorCard access-level regression; verified with swiftlint, swift test, macOS build, and iOS simulator build.
